title: Modular VS Code extension runtime and package workflow UI

source.subject: refactor: modular extension runtime, commands, and package workflow UI

body:
## Outcome

Modular extension runtime, commands, and package workflow UI.

## Context

- Workstream **editor-extension** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **VS Code extension & Open VSX** (`v02-editor-extension`).

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid_vscode`
- **Commit:** [`f6eceb6`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_vscode/commit/f6eceb6) — refactor: modular extension runtime, commands, and package workflow UI
